title: This world is getting more volatile. What can investors do?
section_path: This world is getting more volatile. What can investors do?
section_path_text: This world is getting more volatile. What can investors do?
summary:
Main
The three things investors should know this week
Political developments, especially out of the US, suggest that we might be faced with higher structural volatility in the next few years. Already the US election drama has affected the equity rally, the yield curve and rate expectations. We believe that investors could consider taking steps to deal with a more volatile world going forward
By George Lagarias
John Buchan (1875-1940), 1st Baron Tweedsmuir, author of "The Thirty Nine Steps" and General Governor of Canada once said: ''You think that a wall as solid as the earth separates civilization from barbarism.
